articles.title: Buying Spree: The Top 10 Ethereum Wallets Now Own 20.58% of ETH’s Supply
articles.description: By increasing their holdings by more than 2% in 40 days, the top ten Ethereum wallets now own about 20.5% of all the asset's overall supply.

articles.title: Uniswap v3 launches Optimistic Ethereum layer two scaling in alpha
articles.description: Long-awaited layer two scaling is finally being launched on Uniswap v3, albeit in a limited format initially.

articles.title: TA: Ethereum (ETH) Tumbles, Why Key Indicators Suggest More Pain
articles.description: Ethereum declined below the main $2,000 support zone against the US Dollar. ETH price is showing bearish signs and it remains at a risk of more downsides below $1,800. articles.title: Coinbase Connects Wallet to Polygon Network For L2 Scaling
articles.description: North American cryptocurrency exchange giant Coinbase is keen to embrace layer 2 scaling technologies with its latest move to integrate the Polygon Network.

articles.title: Concern as Uniswap-backed 'DeFi Education Fund' dumps $10M worth of UNI
articles.description: The recently formed DeFi Education Fund has come under fire for abruptly announcing it had liquidated half of the 1 million UNI tokens donated to it through UNI governance.
